parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for business name or service name

get.summary: Get business details by public URL slug
Get public booking settings for a business
get.description: Returns settings relevant to the public booking page: guest checkout, required fields, payment methods, booking policies, scheduling info.

patch.description: Update staff details including booking mode. When changing booking mode (STATIC/DYNAMIC), the change will take effect after the last existing booking if there are any. To cancel a pending booking mode transition, send pendingBookingMode: null.

get.description: Returns current booking mode, pending mode change, and info about existing bookings that may block immediate mode change.

delete.description: Cancel a scheduled booking mode change that has not yet taken effect.

patch.description: Update asset details including booking mode. When changing booking mode (STATIC/DYNAMIC), the change will take effect after the last existing booking if there are any. To cancel a pending booking mode transition, send pendingBookingMode: null.

get.description: Returns current booking mode, pending mode change, and info about existing bookings that may block immediate mode change.

delete.description: Cancel a scheduled booking mode change that has not yet taken effect.

parameters.name: includeBusinessWide
parameters.description: Set to false to exclude business-wide holiday exceptions

post.summary: Create a booking as admin (can override rules)

get.summary: Get business bookings with optional filters

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search over booking reference/id, customer name/phone/email, staff name, and service name

patch.description: Quick status update. For full updates use PATCH /admin/bookings/:id

get.description: Get full booking details including service, resource, user, and branch info

patch.description: Update booking status, payment info, notes, and starred status. Supports: status, paymentStatus, paymentReference, paymentMethod, isStarred, businessNotes, notes

post.summary: Create a session for STATIC mode resources
post.description: Create a pre-defined session (class, appointment slot) for resources in STATIC booking mode. Sessions can be one-time (with date) or recurring (with dayOfWeek 0-6).

get.description: Get all sessions for the business. Optionally filter by resourceId.

get.summary: List sessions by date with booking stats
get.description: Returns sessions that apply to a specific date with aggregate counts (booked, attended, no-show, pending, confirmed).
Get detailed information about a session including current bookings.

patch.description: Update session details like name, time, capacity, etc.

delete.description: Delete a session. Cannot delete if there are upcoming bookings. Cancel bookings first or mark as inactive.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: Specific resource ID (optional - returns all if not provided)

post.summary: Create a booking as a guest (no auth required)

patch.summary: Reschedule own booking to a new time

post.summary: Create a review for a business

get.summary: Get all reviews for the business

post.summary: Assign a staff member to an asset/room
Join waitlist for a branch/service time slot

delete.summary: Leave waitlist entry by ID and contact verification

get.summary: Get waitlist entries for the admin business with slot grouping

post.summary: Notify waitlist entries (single entry by id, or next entries for a slot)

info.title: Bookly API
info.description: API documentation for the Bookly platform

platform.description: The name of the social platform (e.g., facebook, instagram, twitter)

url.description: The URL of the social platform

description.example: A modern beauty salon offering hair and spa services.

socialLinks.description: List of social media links for the business

owner.description: Owner admin details for the business

slug.description: URL-friendly slug (auto-generated from name if not provided)

socialLinks.description: List of social media links for the business

coverImage.description: Asset file uuid for cover/banner image

slug.description: Public URL slug for the business

serviceIds.description: Optional list of service IDs to link

gallery.description: Optional list of asset IDs to link

serviceIds.description: Optional list of service IDs to link

gallery.description: Optional list of asset IDs to link

subType.description: The type of asset required (ROOM or EQUIPMENT)

quantity.description: How many units of this asset type are needed per booking

price.description: Price of the service in USD

customTaxRate.description: Custom tax rate percentage (0-100) when taxRate is custom

categoryIds.description: Optional list of category IDs to link

gallery.description: Optional list of asset IDs to link

resourceRequirements.description: Resource requirements for this service (e.g., requires 1 ROOM)

customTaxRate.description: Updated custom tax rate (0-100) when taxRate is custom

categoryIds.description: Updated list of category IDs (overwrites existing)

branchIds.description: Updated list of branch IDs (overwrites existing)

gallery.description: Optional list of asset IDs to link

resourceRequirements.description: Resource requirements for this service (e.g., requires 1 ROOM). Overwrites existing requirements.

bookingMode.description: Booking mode: STATIC (pre-defined sessions) or DYNAMIC (flexible booking)

branchId.description: Branch ID to link the staff member to

serviceIds.description: Optional list of service IDs to link

profilePhoto.description: Asset file uuid for profile photo

slotDuration.description: Slot duration in minutes (null = use service duration)

bookingMode.description: Booking mode: STATIC (pre-defined sessions) or DYNAMIC (flexible booking). Mode changes take effect after the last existing booking.

bookingModeEffectiveDate.description: Date when the booking mode change becomes effective. If not provided, system calculates based on last booking.

branchId.description: Branch ID to link the staff member to

serviceIds.description: Optional list of service IDs to link

profilePhoto.description: Asset file uuid for profile photo

isActive.description: Whether this staff member is active

slotDuration.description: Slot duration in minutes (null = use service duration)

pendingBookingMode.description: Set to null to cancel a pending booking mode transition. Requires validation that no bookings exist in the pending period.

subType.description: Sub-type of asset (ROOM or EQUIPMENT). Only applicable for ASSET type resources.

bookingMode.description: Booking mode: STATIC (pre-defined sessions) or DYNAMIC (flexible booking)

description.example: Indoor tennis court with synthetic surface

branchId.description: Branch ID to link the asset to

maxConcurrent.description: Maximum concurrent bookings (e.g., 4 players for tennis court)

serviceIds.description: Optional list of service IDs to link

slotDuration.description: Slot duration in minutes (null = use service duration)

description.example: Indoor tennis court with synthetic surface

branchId.description: Branch ID to link the asset to

serviceIds.description: Optional list of service IDs to link

slotDuration.description: Slot duration in minutes (null = use service duration)

pendingBookingMode.description: Set to null to cancel a pending booking mode transition. Requires validation that no bookings exist in the pending period.

bookingModeEffectiveDate.description: When the booking mode change should take effect (if has future bookings)

resourceId.description: Resource ID (staff or asset) - branchId will be derived from resource

branchId.description: Branch ID (only needed for branch-level default hours, not required if resourceId is provided)

resourceId.description: Resource ID (staff or asset) - branchId will be derived from resource

branchId.description: Branch ID (only needed for branch-level break, not required if resourceId is provided)

startTime.description: Start time (HH:mm) - null for whole day

endTime.description: End time (HH:mm) - null for whole day

resourceId.description: Resource ID (staff or asset). If set, this creates a resource-level exception.

branchId.description: Branch ID for branch-level exception. If both resourceId and branchId are omitted, a business-wide holiday exception is created.

resourceId.description: Legacy resource/staff ID alias. Prefer staffId.

staffId.description: Preferred staff ID. Supports auto-assign via null/empty/"no-preference".

roomId.description: Preferred room/asset ID. Supports auto-assign via null/empty/"no-preference-room".

sessionId.description: Session ID - required for STATIC mode resources (pre-defined sessions like classes)

partySize.description: Number of participants for this booking

status.description: Optional booking status (supports FE + DB status values)

paymentStatus.description: Optional payment status (supports FE + DB values)

status.description: New status (supports FE values: confirmed|pending|attended|cancelled|need_confirm|no_show and DB values)
Booking status (supports FE values: confirmed|pending|attended|cancelled|need_confirm|no_show and DB values)

paymentStatus.description: Payment status (supports FE values: paid|unpaid|need_confirm and DB values)

paymentMethod.description: Payment method (bank_transfer, cash_on_arrival, card_on_arrival, online_payment, instapay)

businessNotes.description: Internal notes - only visible to staff

startTime.description: New start time for the booking

resourceId.description: Legacy resource/staff ID alias. Prefer staffId.

staffId.description: Optional new staff ID. Supports auto-assign via null/empty/"no-preference".

roomId.description: Optional new room ID. Supports auto-assign via null/empty/"no-preference-room".

email.description: The email of the user to verify

code.description: Verification code sent to the user via email
